description: After Ruby’s death, the remaining S.H.I.E.L.D. team processes what transpired. Daisy is furious at Yo-Yo’s actions, while Elena defends her decision as necessary to save the world. The emotional fallout is palpable, and Hale flees the scene, devastated by her daughter's demise.
location: Hydra facility (abandoned English nuclear silo / Particle Infusion Chamber site)

transcript.line: I had it under control. She was coming around, and then Yo-Yo killed her.
No. I just saved the world.
